name: Taita Hills Landslide-Flood Early Warning
notes: Design complete 2021. Wundanyi and Mwatate are highest risk. Budget approved but not disbursed to KMD. Terrain-specific thresholds not calibrated.

name: Tsavo River Riparian Buffer
blocking_factor: Tsavo National Park boundary complicates jurisdiction
notes: Buffer mapped. KWS manages river within park; NEMA has jurisdiction outside. Coordinated enforcement protocol not established.

name: Voi Town Drainage
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and engineering staff capacity
notes: Design complete. Phase 1 procurement stalled twice. County engineering department two-thirds understaffed.
